name: Stir-Fried Vegetables
recipeIngredient: 1/2 medium onion; sliced and separated into rings
1 cup - red pepper or pimento; chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, mix the first five ingredients together and set aside.
2. Heat a large skillet or wok over high heat; add olive oil.
3. Stir fry onion rings, bok choy, and garlic in hot oil for 1-2 minutes. Remove from wok. Set aside.
4. Place mushrooms, bamboo shoots, sweet corn, and water chestnuts in the wok or skillet. Stir-fry for about 2 minutes.
5. Add the soy mixture and cook until bubbly, stirring frequently. Add broccoli and red pepper, cover, and cook for 3 minutes or until broccoli is crisp-tender. Stir in onion, bok choy, and garlic, then serve.
